title: Iraqi Kidnappers of Journalist Shelly Kittleson Offer to Negotiate
summary_full: The Iranian-aligned militia, Kataib Hezbollah, is pressing for the release of members detained by the Iraqi government in exchange for freeing the journalist, Shelly Kittleson.
summary_public: The Iranian-aligned militia, Kataib Hezbollah, is pressing for the release of members detained by the Iraqi government in exchange for freeing the journalist, Shelly Kittleson.

IQ.label: negative
IQ.evidence: Iranian-aligned militia, Kataib Hezbollah, is pressing for release

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian-aligned militia, Kataib Hezbollah, is pressing for release
